Description: Designed a digital identity for Skros, a tree care company. The new brand system delivers a clear overview of services and streamlines client communication.
Redesigned the layout of MyTalentBuilder, a platform helping teams and individuals develop their unique talents. The overhaul yields a user-friendly, intuitive interface.
Designed and developed a personal portfolio for my web projects and dynamic experiences. The resulting site features a sleek, technical look with integrated 3D elements and animations.
Crafted the visual identity for a Rejoice Soundsystem music event. Serving as an ode to the 90s, the design relies on high contrast, heavy typography, and distilled graphics.
Developed an event poster for Jamrock Leuven and Kingstep Soundsystem. Inspired by early dancehall prints, it features a text-heavy, blocked style in a bold duotone palette.
Designed the artwork for Stand Tall at STUK Leuven, an intimate, soundsystem-driven dance experience. The resulting style is warm and clean, filled with playful graphic elements.
A selection of digital illustrations and drawings inspired by classic cartoons and comic books. Each piece features vibrant, high-contrast color palettes.
Explorations in watercolor technique on paper. These landscape scenes are directly inspired by real-world locations visited during my travels.
Acrylic paintings on canvas featuring references to nature and dreamlike scenes. These pieces experiment with color, shape, and shadow to form dynamic compositions.
